data.summary: The evidence provided does not confirm the requirement of QR code scanning functionality.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the QR code scanning capability via phone camera or dedicated scanner. However, the evidence does not include any specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case mentions the need for QR code scanning, but without concrete evidence, the requirement cannot be validated, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming QR code scanning via phone camera or dedicated scanner.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify QR code scanning functionality.
